3028680.name: Medival Hustle
3028680.description:
In this captivating 3D medival-quest game, you will immerse yourself in a world of fantasy landscapes, where every hill and castle hides its own secrets and adventures.

Features:
- Open World:
You will find yourself in a vast world where you can move freely.
- Quests and Missions:
Exciting quests await you, which will diversify your gaming experience. From searching for ancient artifacts to rescuing people.
- Hills and Castles
Travel through green hills, where picturesque views and hidden caves await you.
- Colorful Graphics
The visual perception of the game is a true work of art.
